title: fixture: multivariate_normal case '3d_identity_scale' missing 'mean' field
description: The MultivariateNormal conformance fixture in ferrotorch-distributions/tests/conformance/fixtures.json has a 'mean' field for case '2d_cholesky' but not for '3d_identity_scale'. Tracked from Audit-Fix Phase 12 (#1086). When fixed, the conformance test 'multivariate_normal_fixtures_log_prob_entropy_mean' should assert against case['mean'] for both cases (currently falls back to loc for the case missing 'mean').
